# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-destination
  ports:
  - port: 8086
    targetPort: 8086
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-proxy
  ports:
  - port: 4143
    targetPort: 4143
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: api-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
    - principals:
      - "linkerd-proxy.default.svc.cluster.local"
    - principals:
      - "linkerd-destination.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
